mapper.select: select approvalid, approvalname from cotdl.tbl_piiapproval order by approvalid
select approvalid, approvalname from cotdl.tbl_piiapproval where approvalid= #{approvalid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by approvalid
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piiapproval (approvalid, approvalname) values (#{approvalid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalname, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
insert into cotdl.tbl_piiapproval (approvalid, approvalname) values (#{approvalid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalname, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select:
select approvalid, approvalname from cotdl.tbl_piiapproval
order by approvalid limit #{offset}, #{amount}
